title: tephrosia cana
intro: Tephrosia cana, also known as silver clusterbean or silver bush, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Tephrosia cana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
